outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump at cabinet: Iran 'begging to make a deal' — but no ceasefire imminent as IRGC fires Wave 82 at Israel
outlets.summary: CNN's live blog focuses on Trump's cabinet meeting claims that Iran is 'begging to make a deal' while IRGC simultaneously launched its 82nd wave of missile attacks. Covers 2 killed in Abu Dhabi by missile debris, Hezbollah rocket kills 1 in Nahariya. G7 split with Germany calling war a 'catastrophe.'

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran rejects Trump's proposal to end the war and lays out 5 conditions
outlets.summary: Iran formally rejected the US 15-point ceasefire plan and issued 5 counter-conditions including war reparations and sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Pentagon considering 'final blow' options for Iran, including seizing key oil island
outlets.summary: Reports of Kharg Island seizure plans coincide with Iran fortifying the island with mines and MANPADs.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops — but it may backfire, analysts say
outlets.summary: Analysts warn the 82nd Airborne deployment and 'final blow' options may harden Iranian resistance rather than compel diplomacy.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump Reveals Conditions for Iran's Surrender as Hegseth Confirms: 'Iran Has No Navy, No Navy Leader'
outlets.summary: Breitbart frames the cabinet meeting as Trump laying out Iran's 'surrender conditions.' Hegseth's 'no navy, no navy leader' quote prominently featured. Site characterizes any calls for ground troops from WSJ as 'globalist overreach.'

outlets.name: New York Post
outlets.headline: Architect of Hormuz blockade eliminated: Iran's top naval chief killed by Israel
outlets.summary: The Post highlights the symbolic importance of killing the officer personally responsible for the oil blockade.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump warns Iran: 'NO TURNING BACK' after Tehran rejects peace plan
outlets.summary: Breitbart highlights Trump's Truth Social warning to Iran after the 15-point plan was rejected.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Oil prices spike after Iran rejects peace deal — gas approaching $4/gallon
outlets.summary: Brent rebounding to $97 after briefly falling to $93 on ceasefire hopes; national gas average at $3.981 approaching $4 milestone.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: US demands Tehran accept defeat as Israel pounds Lebanon — IRGC Navy chief Tangsiri killed
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's liveblog leads with IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri's killing. Covers Iran's Wave 82 attack, UAE civilian deaths in Abu Dhabi, Kuwait Hezbollah cell arrest, Trump's 'Iran begging' Cabinet remarks, and G7 Europe split. Notes Trump approval rating has fallen to 36%.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Iran's top naval commander killed as Tehran fires missiles at Gulf states
outlets.summary: Reuters covers the simultaneous Tangsiri killing and Iran's escalating strikes against UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Trump confronts new Iran demands as Pentagon weighs Kharg Island seizure
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers the diplomatic deadlock and the simultaneous military escalation with Kharg ground options.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 27: IRGC navy chief killed, UAE under attack, Iraq authorises counter-strikes
outlets.summary: BBC highlights the three simultaneous escalations: Tangsiri killing, Gulf state attacks, and Iraq's first formal military authorization.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hezbollah rocket kills man in Nahariya; IDF soldier Volansky killed in Lebanon tank strike — 4th IDF death in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Times of Israel liveblog focuses on Israeli domestic casualties: 1 killed and 14 wounded in Nahariya rocket strike; Sgt. Volansky killed in Merkava tank hit (4th IDF soldier killed in Lebanon). Also covers Trump's cabinet meeting, Tangsiri's death, and IRGC Wave 82.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF soldier killed in Lebanon, third since war began; all Litani bridges destroyed
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Staff Sgt. Ori Greenberg's death in Lebanon and the IDF's completion of the Litani bridge destruction campaign.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Strike kills IRGC Navy chief Tangsiri in Strait of Hormuz, Israeli official tells Post
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post highlights Katz's statement and the significance of killing the officer who designed the Hormuz blockade.

outlets.name: Ynet
outlets.headline: Day 27: Iran fires 7 missile salvos; Navy chief killed; UAE targeted; Pentagon eyes Kharg seizure
outlets.summary: Ynet's comprehensive Day 27 summary covers all major escalations.

outlets.name: Tasnim News Agency
outlets.headline: Iran warns regional neighbors: Any country aiding Kharg Island seizure will face strikes on vital infrastructure
outlets.summary: IRGC-affiliated Tasnim leads with Iran Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf's warning that any country assisting a US Kharg Island seizure will face attacks on 'vital infrastructure.' Also covers Houthi readiness to open Bab al-Mandab Strait as a second front. Frames Tangsiri's death as martyrdom.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: IRGC: Wave 81 of True Promise 4 strikes 70+ Israeli targets with precision missiles
outlets.summary: IRNA reports IRGC's claimed strikes on Israeli targets, listing Haifa, Dimona area, and Tel Aviv environs as targets.

outlets.name: Tasnim
outlets.headline: Iran warns: 'Don't send your children to hell' — IRGC threatens response to any ground operation
outlets.summary: Tasnim covers the IRGC's warning against a US ground operation in Iran, citing Kharg Island and other sensitive sites.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Israel kills IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri — Iran silent as strikes on Persian Gulf coast accelerate
outlets.summary: Iran International — a diaspora outlet critical of the Islamic Republic — covers the Tangsiri killing and notes Iran's conspicuous silence on confirming the death.
